statusDetail: Anton completed the scheduled site-improvement loop and recorded the result.
actionRequired: No action needed unless you want to review the latest commit.
summary:
Implemented the next Anton slice: Garage now has a `Download Backup` action in `garage.html#diagnostic-activity`.

What changed:
- Added a Garage JSON backup download using the existing syncable Garage storage keys in [garage-data.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage-data.js) and [garage.js](C:/Users/diazv/Desktop/Ridgeline/garage.js).
- Added the UI button and note that photo metadata is included, but browser-local image bytes are not.
- Added search keywords for â€œgarage backupâ€.
- Added smoke-check assertions for the new backup control.
- Bumped service worker cache to `ridgeline-console-v266`.
- Updated `ANTON.md`, state, backlog, roadmap, and audit notes.

Verification:
- `Test-InternalLinks.ps1` passed for 16 HTML files.
- Edge smoke still hit the known `--dump-dom` missing-main failure.
- Playwright/Chrome fallback passed for mobile and desktop Garage rendering, no horizontal overflow, backup JSON download, expected payload keys, photo-data exclusion, search coverage, and Search Escape cleanup.
- Screenshots: `debug-screenshots/audit-v266-garage-backup-mobile.png`, `audit-v266-search-garage-backup-mobile.png`, and `audit-v266-garage-backup-desktop.png`.

Next clean slice: filtered diagnostic-activity JSON export or Garage import/restore, after this backup download behavior has a little real-use validation.
